mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reflections WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reflections(id, user_id, generation_record_id, reference_text, title, content, visibility, status, draft_saved_at, published_at, comment_count, like_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{generationRecordId}, #{referenceText}, #{title}, #{content}, #{visibility}, #{status}, #{draftSavedAt}, #{publishedAt}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reflections SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reflections WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reflections WHERE visibility = 'public' AND deleted_at IS NULL
